meta.description: An event in an item's lifecycle.

targetId.description: UUID of the item this event belongs to.

eventType.description: What happened. created — first event for this item. updated — one or more fields changed. deleted — item has been removed.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing event number scoped per targetId. Starts at 1 for created. Never reused.

by.description: Identity of the actor who caused this event. Free-form string matching the adapter's identity format (email, username, UUID). Null for system-generated changes such as migration scripts or bootstrapper writes.

delta.description: Field-level diff. Keys are dot-separated paths (e.g. "item.value", "payload.status"). Each value is { from, to }. Empty object {} for created and deleted events.

snapshot.description: The complete four-section item.json after this event was applied. For deleted, the snapshot is the final state before deletion.

sqlSchema: -- Built-in type: adapter handles storage natively.
